dashboard_subtitle: Your personal dashboard with quick access to key areas.
dashboard_guide_description: Here's what your application includes to help you get started.
dashboard_guide_profile: Personalize your experience with a custom profile and avatar.
dashboard_guide_security: Keep your account secure with password management and two-factor authentication.
dashboard_guide_admin: Manage users, roles, and system settings from the admin panel.
dashboard_quickAction_profile: View and update your personal information and avatar.
dashboard_quickAction_settings: Manage your password, security, and preferences.
dashboard_quickAction_admin: Manage users, roles, and system configuration.
dashboard_dev_description: This card is for you, the developer. Remove it when you start building. Or never. Your call.
dashboard_dev_customizeDesc: Edit the dashboard page and remove the explainer components. Keep the widgets or replace them with your own.
dashboard_dev_stepGenerate: Run pnpm run api:generate to regenerate frontend types
dashboard_dev_cleanupKeys: Remove i18n keys from en/dashboard.json and cs/dashboard.json:
